arts.ttl: Forest move level with Arsenal with win at Wolves
arts.sum: Nottingham Forest made it six Premier League wins in a row with a 3-0 win over Wolves at Molineux.

arts.ttl: Arsenal second transfer confirmed as club make decision on future of wonderkid
arts.sum: The 20-year-old left the Gunners and joined League One side Shrewsbury Town on a season-long loan in the summer. Wigan Athletic announced on New Year's Day that they had signed defender Josh Robinson on a three-and-a-half year deal from the Gunners.

arts.ttl: Saliba error, missed red card, Arteta misery - Arsenal penalty verdict after more VAR controversy - football.london
arts.sum: Going down clutching his head after a challenge from Saliba inside the penalty area, referee Anthony Taylor awarded a penalty, with it coming from a fairly unique situation. Already, Arsenal had seen Declan Rice dismissed - for kicking the ball away and delaying the restart - in what was the reverse fixture against Brighton.

arts.ttl: Arsenal told Alexander Isak January transfer truth as £63m Newcastle advantage laid out
arts.sum: Former Newcastle United striker Alan Shearer has insisted no club would be able to afford Alexander Isak amid transfer speculation links to Arsenal . "[Erling] Haaland has been through a tough time but he's always going to score goals.

arts.ttl: Viktor Gyokeres and Igor Jesus - four strikers Arsenal can sign in January transfer window - Isaac Johnson - football.london
arts.sum: Arsenal's two natural centre-forward options, Kai Havertz and Gabriel Jesus, have scored a combined ten Premier League goals this season. Matheus Cunha is one of the players to have scored the same amount of Premier League goals as Havertz and Jesus combined.

arts.ttl: Arsenal chief breaks silence after Premier League CEO sends FFP warning to club
arts.sum: Arsenal vice-chairman Tim Lewis has revealed his concerns about the pending introduction of a football regulator and has warned its installation could damage the Premier League. Since the Labour government took power, there has been one significant change made to the proposed bill; the ability for the regulator to have some control over parachute payments - the money handed to relegated clubs.

arts.ttl: Joao Pedro gives honest penalty verdict after Brighton vs Arsenal controversy
arts.sum: The Brazilian claims he took a 'hit' from William Saliba in the incident which resulted in the Seagulls' equalising penalty. Brighton forward Joao Pedro has given his honest verdict following the controversial penalty incident against Arsenal this weekend.

arts.ttl: Arsenal star Ethan Nwaneri could miss nine games with injury as Mikel Arteta crisis continues
arts.sum: He will be back soon, but there are big games coming up and Arsenal need attacking cover. The performance of his Arsenal side away to Brighton was one that needed a bit of luck to get a positive result over the line, but as it happened, things only got worse.

arts.ttl: Brighton vs Arsenal referee review amid Saliba and Gabriel penalty shouts
arts.sum: Barring one overhit cross, the home side rarely looked like scoring but were given the gift of a penalty after Anthony Taylor deemed William Saliba to have fouled Joao Pedro in the box after “missing” an attempted header and connecting with the forward. Liverpool’s draw with Manchester United has kept the title hopes alive but come May, the Gunners may rue these lost points.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta gives damning Ethan Nwaneri update as Arsenal suffer nightmare Newcastle scenario
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta faced the media ahead of Arsenal's match with Newcastle in the Carabao Cup semi-final. Kai Havertz missed out for the second successive match, was unable to train, and was sent home before the trip to Brighton.
